prompt: Tap button seat before blocker-plus-ICM action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before ICM decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The button is the right seat anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the late-acting seat that controls the pressure window.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The button is the target seat anchor because blocker-plus-ICM pressure depends on the late-acting seat.
